name: Satyam Kushwaha
heroDescription: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience building scalable web and mobile applications. Specialized in AI-driven systems, LLM integration, and cloud-native architectures using AWS — delivered end-to-end using React and Node.js with a focus on scalability, reliability, and user experience.
aboutTitle: I Build AI-Driven Full-Stack Systems End-to-End
aboutBody: Hi, I'm Satyam — a full-stack engineer with 4+ years of experience shipping production SaaS, AI-powered platforms, and mobile apps. I enjoy architecting scalable systems, integrating LLMs into real user workflows, and leading features from whiteboard to deploy.

resume.summary: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience building scalable web and mobile applications. Specialized in AI-driven systems, LLM integration, and cloud-native architectures using AWS. Strong expertise in full-stack development, system design, REST APIs, and performance optimization. Proven track record of delivering high-performance SaaS platforms and leading end-to-end development using React and Node.js, with a focus on scalability, reliability, and user experience.

bullets: Led end-to-end development of a scalable web platform handling frontend and backend systems.
Designed AI-driven features using OpenAI APIs, improving content generation and user engagement.
Architected scalable backend systems supporting concurrent users and real-time interactions.
Established CI/CD pipelines and coding standards to improve development efficiency.
Collaborated with stakeholders to deliver production-ready features aligned with business goals.

experience.company: Eqaim Technology and Services Pvt. Ltd.
bullets: Developed and optimized web applications, improving performance and database efficiency.
Built an AI-powered content moderation system for detecting unsafe media content.
Developed an LLM-based document Q&A system using prompt pipelines.
Engineered a resume automation platform for CV creation and job integrations.
Built responsive UIs using React.js and improved user experience.
Developed REST APIs and integrated frontend with backend services.
Optimized database queries for better performance.
Led development of a learning platform and improved UI/UX design.
Mentored students and conducted mock interviews.
